title: Product Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, statistics. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: VectorApps is hiring a junior product data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V029: Product Data Analyst at VectorApps. Location: Remote. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 0.9 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, statistics, airflow, looker, bigquery. Optional skills: product analytics, ga4. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
